title: Create (Refreshed)
description: A new refreshed look which adds the best parts of create mod
body:
# Create Mod

The Create mod is a dynamic and immersive modification for Minecraft that brings mechanical engineering and automation to the forefront of your gameplay experience. This mod allows players to design and build complex machinery, automate resource processing, and craft intricate systems using a variety of new components. From conveyor belts and rotating gears to advanced mechanical contraptions, Create offers a broad range of tools and elements to revolutionize how you interact with the Minecraft world.

## Core Features:

Mechanical Power: Utilize rotational power through components like shafts, gears, and cogs to drive your machines. Create a variety of mechanical devices that work together seamlessly to perform tasks and processes.
Conveyor Belts and Chutes: Automate the transport of items with conveyor belts, chutes, and other transport systems. Move resources efficiently between different parts of your base.
Complex Machines: Build and configure complex machines, such as mills, mixers, and crushers, to automate crafting and processing. Design and assemble large-scale production lines with ease.
Visual Feedback: The mod provides detailed visual feedback on the workings of your machines, allowing you to see the flow of power and the movement of items in real-time.

## Create: Dreams and Desires

Create: Dreams and Desires is an addon that enhances the Create mod with new imaginative and whimsical elements, allowing players to explore even more creative possibilities. It builds on the foundation of the Create mod by introducing unique components and systems that add depth and variety to your mechanical creations.

## Ad Astra

Ad Astra is a space-themed mod that extends the Minecraft universe by introducing space travel, new planets, and futuristic technology. The mod is designed to give players the ability to explore outer space, discover new celestial bodies, and engage with space-themed gameplay mechanics. 

Much More!!!
